questions.text: What makes a Soul-Bound Token (SBT) different from a regular NFT?

options.text: SBTs are more expensive to mint
SBTs cannot be transferred to another wallet after minting
SBTs can only be minted on Ethereum

questions.explanation: The defining feature of an SBT is that it is permanently bound to the original recipient's wallet. It cannot be sold, gifted, or moved.
questions.modelAnswer:
✅ B - Non-Transferable

The defining feature of an SBT is that it is permanently bound to the original recipient's wallet. It cannot be sold, gifted, or moved.

questions.text: On which network is the MST Certified Blockchain Developer certificate minted?
questions.explanation: The certificate is minted directly on MST mainnet, ensuring it is permanently verifiable on the live network.
questions.modelAnswer:
✅ C - MST Mainnet, Chain ID 4646

The certificate is minted directly on MST mainnet, ensuring it is permanently verifiable on the live network.

questions.text: An employer wants to verify your MST certificate. What should you send them?

options.text: A screenshot of the certificate from your wallet
A PDF downloaded from the academy portal
A link to your SBT on MST Explorer (mstscan.com)
Your wallet's private key so they can log in and check

questions.explanation: The MST Explorer link allows instant, trustless verification. Screenshots and PDFs can be forged. Private keys must never be shared.
questions.modelAnswer:
✅ C - MST Explorer Link

The MST Explorer link allows instant, trustless verification. Screenshots and PDFs can be forged. Private keys must never be shared.

questions.text: Once minted, you can transfer your MST certificate SBT to another wallet if you upgrade your hardware wallet.
The claim link for your certificate can be used multiple times to mint additional copies.
"A PDF certificate is just as valid as an on-chain SBT because both contain the same information."
questions.explanation: 📊 2 marks: FALSE + justification covering forgery risk and on-chain verification.
questions.modelAnswer: 📊 2 marks: FALSE + justification covering forgery risk and on-chain verification.

questions.text: Explain three advantages of an on-chain SBT certificate over a traditional paper or PDF certificate. Use specific MST features in your answer.
questions.explanation:
1. Instant Verification: Employers can verify the SBT on MST Explorer (mstscan.com) in seconds by checking the issuer address and token details - no need to contact the academy. Traditional certificates require emailing the institution and waiting days.
          2. Forgery-Proof: An SBT is cryptographically signed by the issuer and recorded immutably on MST mainnet (Chain ID 4646). A PDF can be easily forged with design tools. The blockchain's immutability guarantees authenticity.
          3. Permanent & User-Controlled: The SBT lives in the holder's wallet forever - no institution can revoke or delete it. With MST's SARAL protocol, even non-technical users can safely manage their credentials without seed phrase complexity.
questions.modelAnswer:
✅ Model Answer (three required)

1. Instant Verification: Employers can verify the SBT on MST Explorer (mstscan.com) in seconds by checking the issuer address and token details - no need to contact the academy. Traditional certificates require emailing the institution and waiting days.

2. Forgery-Proof: An SBT is cryptographically signed by the issuer and recorded immutably on MST mainnet (Chain ID 4646). A PDF can be easily forged with design tools. The blockchain's immutability guarantees authenticity.

3. Permanent & User-Controlled: The SBT lives in the holder's wallet forever - no institution can revoke or delete it. With MST's SARAL protocol, even non-technical users can safely manage their credentials without seed phrase complexity.

3 marks: 1 per valid advantage with clear explanation. Must mention at least one MST-specific element (Chain ID, Explorer, SARAL, etc.).
